error_signature: Execute Command node not showing up
title: Execute Command node not appearing in n8n
symptom: The Execute Command node is not visible in the node selection menu, despite enabling it via environment variables.
not_this_if: Execute Command node is visible in the node selection menu
root_cause: Since n8n version 2.0, the Execute Command node is disabled by default through the NODES_EXCLUDE environment variable. Users must explicitly re-enable it to make it available in the node selection.
fix_steps: Set the NODES_EXCLUDE environment variable to allow the Execute Command node, either by enabling all nodes or selectively excluding others.
Recreate the Docker container using 'docker compose down' followed by 'docker compose up -d'.
agent_instruction: Modify the NODES_EXCLUDE variable in your docker-compose.yml to enable the Execute Command node and recreate the container.
